name: Does voice search optimization still matter if most people just click through regular search results?
description: Yes, because the same work improves local clarity, mobile usability, and answer visibility even when users do not use voice.

mainEntity.name: Does voice search optimization still matter if most people just click through regular search results?

acceptedAnswer.text: A common concern is whether this helps only small firms, but the answer is no. Any business that depends on being found locally or answering urgent questions can benefit from better spoken-query visibility.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, because the same work improves local clarity, mobile usability, and answer visibility even when users do not use voice.
